title: OperatorOS Module Registry
description: Curated list of public OperatorOS modules. Fetched by `operatoros search` and `operatoros install`.

modules.name: journal
modules.description: Append-only timestamped journal entries. The simplest possible OperatorOS module — 1 YAML file, 0 deps.
modules.author: Taras Polishchuk

modules.name: vault
modules.description: Encrypted secret storage backed by gpg + age. See SECURITY.md for threat model.
modules.author: Taras Polishchuk

modules.name: git-automation
modules.description: Pre-commit hooks, auto-format, conventional commits enforcement.
modules.author: Taras Polishchuk

modules.name: tmux-sessions
modules.description: Declarative tmux session definitions — `operatoros run tmux start` brings up your full dev layout.
modules.author: Taras Polishchuk

modules.name: ai-context
modules.description: Bundles your workspace into a single LLM-friendly context block. Output respects the export deny-list.
modules.author: Taras Polishchuk
